fallback: The blood of an ancient dragon is branded on your arm, whispers turning into immense power; from then on, fate resonates with dragon wings.
At the top of the observatory tower, you witness a void rift, countless volumes of knowledge pour into your soul, and a star mark is etched upon your forehead.
A white deer leads you to an ancient spring in the woods; you drink the moonlit dew, and your face reveals the ancient radiance of the elves.
A fallen deity weaves their final prayer into your heartbeat; you become a living sanctuary, a mortal body bearing compassion.
You pick up a rust-free knight's insignia on an ancient battlefield; a blacksmith recognizes it as a lost hero's relic and offers a high price for it.
In a sunken arena, you duel the shadow of a past champion; upon victory, the essence of their swordsmanship is transferred to you.
Dancing with wind spirits under the moon, your skirt is stained with traceless fairy dust, and your words henceforth carry the magic of a gentle breeze.
The strings of fate are plucked by a hermit; you brush past the reflections of myriad worlds, clutching a paradox seed in your hand.
Having eaten a blood fruit grown from dragon-ash soil, when severely wounded, your heart pounds like a war drum, and broken bones instantly mend.
From an old box in the attic, you find a mad king's manuscript; deciphering a lost formation within, knowledge turns into a mint.
You touch a remnant scale of an ancient dragon; draconic power surges into your limbs, as if claws tear open the veil of fate.
In a secret room of the magic academy, you decipher a lost rune; the whispers of countless predecessors' wisdom echo in your mind.
Under the moon, the elven queen crowns you; her blessing covers you like a light veil, and mortal eyes henceforth follow you.
Excavating an ancient battlefield, you obtain a blood-stained gold coin, engraved with the greed and oaths of a forgotten royal family.
You drink the water of the holy spring; your soul is cleansed of dust, and joy lights the path ahead like morning light.
Death plays chess with you, you win the endgame, henceforth life intertwines with the breath of the underworld, neither undead nor alive.
The spindle of fate reverses, you touch the threads, fragments of countless possibilities pour into your palm.
At the knight's knighting ceremony, the holy sword shines, ancestral spirits whisper, courage pierces through the chest.
You glimpse the sleeping dream of ancient gods, wisdom falls like starlight, burning mortal thoughts yet illuminating truth.
Bathed in dragon blood, scales grow under the skin, you become a half-dragon form, majesty and curse coexist, destiny is no longer human.
Your arm is splashed with ancient dragon blood, at that moment, you feel mountain-like power surging through your body. — The thread of fate gently stirs.
In the dusty secret room of the magic academy, you touch the notes of sages, wisdom floods into your mind like a tide, yet you vaguely hear ancient whispers.
During the adventure, you stumble upon the lost vault of the Dwarf King, wealth spreads before your eyes like starlight. — The gift of fate has long been priced.
The gods crown you in the clouds, glory weaves your cloak, but in the mirror, your eyes hold the sorrow of predecessors.
In the elven ruins under moonlight, you drink the spring of life, joy like a forest breeze brushes your heart.
The heart of the ancient dragon beats in your chest, the flame of life rekindles, but the memories of the old master remain like embers not yet extinguished.
A mysterious coin of fate flips, deciding what blessing you will receive. — Everything is unknown.
Grasping that cursed greatsword, the power of ancient souls surges into your arms, but also brings their obsessions.
The baptism of the spring of wisdom makes your mind as clear as stars, past difficulties suddenly become clear.
The goddess of beauty personally paints your face, henceforth mortals are dazzled by you, while the mirror may reflect the sorrow of the gods.
The essence of the earth gushes from the mountain spring; after bathing, your old wounds are fully healed. This is Eldland's first gift to you.
In the basement of the Adventurers' Guild, a battle hammer covered with cracks resonates with you; the remnant souls of heroes infuse your arms.
The ghost caravan of the ancient trade route brushes past you, leaving a chest full of exotic gold coins; the sounds of camel bells and haggling still echo in your ears.
In the storm, a sea chart unfurls by itself; the constellations mark a new route for you. This is the beginning of an epic that belongs only to you.
Gazing at the stars atop the Sage Tower, you comprehend the trajectory of a celestial body; your wisdom and soul ascend together. Stargazers of all ages stand by your side.
A lost elven lute sounds by itself without being plucked; the notes reshape your demeanor and mind, and the strings are entwined with the fates of ancient bards.

A fragment of the ancient dragon's heart merges into your chest; the dragon's might tempers your body, your countenance becomes handsome, and your life force blazes fiercely. The lingering memories of the dragon soul whisper: you are our descendant.
The rainbow bridge once trodden by deities reappears; you walk upon it, and your appearance, soul, and life are all sanctified. The former shadows of the gods turn to watch.
Your radiance falls like the morning sun; even the harper in the tavern improvises a song for you.
The dusty scrolls of the Arcane Tower unfurl before you; ancient wisdom pours into you like stars.
Amid the dragon's roar, the arm holding your sword no longer trembles; the earth grants you great strength.
Deep in the dungeon, the phylactery blooms with golden light; the treasures left by kings whisper to you.
The spiritual energy of the ancient elven tree cleanses your soul; you hear the song of the world's birth.
At the destined moment, the river of time pauses for you; old wounds and plagues all vanish.
The spindle of fate stops turning; you glimpse the woven threads and seize a wisp of chaos in your hand.
The wandering mage left behind a torn page, and you understood the truth at the edge of the world.
The moon goddess gently kissed your brow, and from then on, mortal dust could not dim your radiance.
Under the starry sky, a unicorn drank water from your palm, and your worries dissipated like ripples.
Encountering a white-robed prophet on the road, starlight entered your forehead from their fingertip, and suddenly your thoughts became clear, as if a faint light guided the way ahead.
Picking up an ancient dragon scale in the ruins, it burned in your palm, and a dormant roar surged within your bloodline.
In the forest, moonlight was like water; a unicorn's eyes reflected the stars. It lowered its head and touched your heart with its horn, healing all old wounds as if you were reborn.
The smoke of ancient battlefields reignited; a heroic spirit appeared wielding a broken sword, bestowing upon you the name of a hero, and the sword's light penetrated your bloodline like a rainbow.
A golden-winged messenger descended from the clouds, tossing a coin of fate into your pouch. With a clink, your fortune and destiny turned.
Drinking the spring of night stars, the reflection in the water suddenly seemed sculpted by a deity; all mortals marveled at your celestial beauty.
Gently touching the runes of a magic array, a torrent of knowledge surged into your soul, and in an instant, you understood all the secrets of ancient and modern arcane arts.
In the inn, firelight flickered; in the song, you suddenly heard your own name. Raising your glass with a smile, all shadows in your heart dissipated.
The ancient dragon flapped its wings, mountains trembled, and old legends awoke once more in the adventurer's heart.
The scholar turned the pages of an ancient book, and a lost arcane art reappeared, but the price remained unknown.
The golden sword was laid upon your shoulder, the oath rang clear, and the heroic spirits of old seemed to whisper.
Deep in the dungeon, ancient gold coins were piled like mountains, but the one who picked them up heard the lament of those before.
The sky splits, holy light descends, and mortals glimpse the threads of fate for a moment.
Five form an oath, blood sworn in a tavern, the shadow of ancient heroes quietly looms.
Dragon breath sweeps by, the flame of life rekindles, yet the dragon's fate also entwines itself.
The gods cast dice, mortal destinies shift, the unknown path may inherit old deeds.
Excavating an ancient battlefield, a broken sword still rings, the holder feels past obsessions.
Passing the trial, the robe is donned, yet behind knowledge lie countless unfinished paths of sages.
The soul of an ancient red dragon is branded upon you, dragon fire tempers bones and sinews, your blood boils like magma, destiny henceforth intertwined with the dragon clan.
The sword in the stone sings, your hand touches it, memories of past holy knights flood into your spirit, your shadow overlaps with ancient heroes, majesty emanates naturally.
You unseal an ancient scroll atop the Star Tower, esoteric rituals infuse the sea of consciousness, the mysteries of the starry vault unfold like a book, wisdom's light purifies the soul.
Gambling with the god of trickery, you stake your fate, win a room full of gold, your family prospers henceforth, yet the deity's lingering laugh remains.
A moon elf gently kisses your brow, an ancient bloodline awakens, your countenance shines like stars, and brings a touch of eternal bliss.
The tomb of a nameless hero appears, its spirit bestows a secret treasure map and lifelong learning, the threads of fate tie to past regrets.
Baptized in the Grand Cathedral of Light, holy light tempers the body, you are knighted as a kingdom's knight, glory and martial prowess shine together.
Stumbling into a time rift, you see your future self offering blessings, vitality and joy fill you, yet the closed loop of fate is hard to resolve.
